rules.expression: (http.user_agent contains "scrapy") or (http.user_agent contains "curl" and not http.request.uri.path contains "/health")

rules.description: Challenge suspicious traffic to login and registration (pair with a separate Rate Limiting rule in the dashboard: Security > WAF > Rate limiting rules, e.g. 10 req/min per IP on these paths)
Block cross-site requests to the admin API (no matching Origin header)
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/admin") and (http.request.method ne "GET") and not (http.request.headers["origin"][0] contains "murgdur.example")

rules.description: Challenge requests from known bad ASNs / Tor exit nodes
